info.name: AppilicoShopServer API
info.description: Complete API collection for AppilicoShopServer. Includes all endpoints across Auth, Brands, Cart, Categories, Customers, Dashboard, Discounts, Inventory, Offers, Orders, Payments, Products, Reviews, Settings, Vouchers, and Wishlist controllers.

request.description: Register a new user account.
Login and receive access + refresh tokens.
Refresh the access token using a refresh token.
Revoke a refresh token. Requires authentication.
Get the authenticated user's profile.
Update the authenticated user's profile.
Request a password reset email.
Reset password using a token from the forgot-password email.
Get all brands. Public endpoint.
Get a single brand by its ID. Public endpoint.
Create a new brand. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Update an existing brand. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Delete a brand. Requires Admin role.

item.name: Cart
item.description: Shopping cart endpoints (api/cart). All endpoints require authentication.

request.description: Get the authenticated user's cart.
Add an item to the cart.
Update the quantity of a cart item.
Remove a specific item from the cart.
Clear all items from the cart.
Get all categories. Public endpoint.
Get the hierarchical category tree. Public endpoint.
Get a single category by its ID. Public endpoint.
Create a new category. Requires Admin or Manager role.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Electronics & Gadgets",
  "description": "Electronic devices, gadgets and accessories",
  "parentCategoryId": null,
  "sortOrder": 1,
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Update an existing category. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Delete a category. Requires Admin role.

item.name: Customers
item.description: Customer management endpoints (api/customers). All endpoints require authentication.

request.description: Get paginated list of customers. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get a single customer by ID.
Get the authenticated user's customer profile.
Update customer information.
Get customer loyalty points and membership tier.
Add loyalty points to a customer. Requires Admin or Manager role.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Dashboard & analytics endpoints (api/dashboard). Requires Admin or Manager role.

request.description: Get sales summary with optional date range filter. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get top selling products. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get revenue chart data for a date range. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get customer statistics. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get all discounts. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get currently active discounts. Public endpoint.
Get a single discount by ID. Requires Admin or Manager role.

body.raw:
{
  "code": "SUMMER25",
  "name": "Summer Sale 25% Off",
  "description": "25% off all summer products",
  "discountType": 0,
  "value": 25.00,
  "minOrderAmount": 50.00,
  "maxDiscountAmount": 100.00,
  "startDate": "2025-06-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2025-08-31T23:59:59Z",
  "usageLimit": 1000
}

request.description: Create a new discount code. Requires Admin or Manager role.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Sale 30% Off",
  "description": "30% off all summer products - updated",
  "value": 30.00,
  "minOrderAmount": 40.00,
  "maxDiscountAmount": 150.00,
  "startDate": "2025-06-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2025-09-30T23:59:59Z",
  "usageLimit": 2000,
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Update an existing discount. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Delete a discount. Requires Admin role.
Validate a discount code against an order amount. Public endpoint.

item.name: Inventory
item.description: Inventory management endpoints (api/inventory). Requires Admin or Manager role.

request.description: Get paginated inventory transactions for a product. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Adjust inventory for a product. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get products with stock below the given threshold. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get all special offers. Public endpoint.
Get currently active offers. Public endpoint.
Get a single offer by ID. Public endpoint.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Black Friday Blowout",
  "description": "Massive discounts on selected electronics",
  "offerType": 0,
  "startDate": "2025-11-28T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2025-11-30T23:59:59Z"
}

request.description: Create a new special offer. Requires Admin or Manager role.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Black Friday Extended",
  "description": "Extended Black Friday deals",
  "startDate": "2025-11-28T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2025-12-02T23:59:59Z",
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Update an existing offer. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Delete an offer. Requires Admin role.
Add products to an offer with offer pricing. Requires Admin or Manager role.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Order management endpoints (api/orders). All endpoints require authentication.

request.description: Get paginated list of all orders. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get a single order by ID.
Get the authenticated user's orders.
Create an order from the current cart.
Update the status of an order. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get the status change history of an order.
Cancel an order.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment processing endpoints (api/payments). All endpoints require authentication.

request.description: Get all payments for a specific order.
Get a single payment by ID.
Process a payment for an order.
Create a refund for a payment. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get all refunds for an order. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Search and filter products with pagination. Public endpoint.
Get a single product by ID. Public endpoint.
Get a product by its SKU. Public endpoint.
Get featured products. Public endpoint.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Wireless Bluetooth Headphones",
  "description": "Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30hr battery life",
  "sku": "WBH-PRO-001",
  "barcode": "1234567890123",
  "categoryId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "brandId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "basePrice": 199.99,
  "costPrice": 89.50,
  "stockQuantity": 150,
  "minStockLevel": 20,
  "weight": 0.35,
  "dimensions": "20x18x8 cm",
  "isFeatured": true
}

request.description: Create a new product. Requires Admin or Manager role.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Wireless Bluetooth Headphones Pro",

}

request.description: Update an existing product. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Delete a product. Requires Admin role.
Add a variant to a product. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get paginated reviews for a product. Public endpoint.
Get a single review by ID. Public endpoint.
Create a new product review. Requires authentication.
Update an existing review. Requires authentication.
Delete a review. Requires authentication.
Approve a pending review. Requires Admin or Manager role.

item.name: Settings
item.description: Application settings endpoints (api/settings). All endpoints require Admin role.

request.description: Get all application settings. Requires Admin role.
Get settings by group name. Requires Admin role.
Get a single setting by its key. Requires Admin role.
Update multiple settings at once. Requires Admin role.
Get all vouchers. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Get a single voucher by ID. Requires Admin or Manager role.

body.raw:
{
  "code": "WELCOME10",
  "description": "Welcome voucher for new customers - 10% off",
  "voucherType": 0,
  "value": 10.00,
  "valueType": 0,
  "minOrderAmount": 25.00,
  "maxRedemptions": 500,
  "startDate": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "expiryDate": "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z",
  "isSingleUse": true
}

request.description: Create a new voucher. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Update an existing voucher. Requires Admin or Manager role.
Delete a voucher. Requires Admin role.
Validate a voucher code against an order amount. Requires authentication.
Redeem a voucher for an order. Requires authentication.

item.name: Wishlist
item.description: Wishlist endpoints (api/wishlist). All endpoints require authentication.

request.description: Get the authenticated user's wishlist.
Add a product to the wishlist by product ID.
Remove a product from the wishlist by product ID.
Check if a product is in the authenticated user's wishlist.
